subject: Auto collision — claimant mentions attorney
description: Rear-end collision on I-35. Claimant dissatisfied with initial offer. Vehicle damage to rear bumper and trunk.

activities.subject: Re: Your claim status
activities.body: This delay is unacceptable. I have consulted my attorney and expect a formal response within 48 hours.

activities.summary: Claimant frustrated; mentioned possible Department of Insurance complaint.

activities.body: CONTACT LOG: Tone hostile. Claimant refused current offer. Requested supervisor callback.
